overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a rainy dusk evening at a wooden cabin in the forest. The camera moves slowly forward from a sheltered porch toward a burning campfire, with wet wooden decks and atmospheric rain effects throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden cabin porch with hanging lantern

agents.ego_description: walking slowly forward along the wet wooden deck of a cabin, moving from the sheltered porch toward the open forest

entered.detail: dark wooden log cabin wall with vertical beams and weathered texture
warm glowing lantern hanging from the cabin roof casting orange light
wet wooden plank walkway with rain puddles reflecting the lantern light
burning campfire with orange flames visible in the distance ahead
dense dark green pine trees surrounding the clearing in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered wooden porch of a forest cabin during a heavy rainstorm at dusk. A warm lantern glows on the left wall while a distant campfire burns ahead. The camera moves steadily forward along the wet, reflective wooden deck, remaining sheltered under the cabin roof while rain falls heavily in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest clearing with central campfire

events.description: exits the sheltered cabin porch into the open forest clearing exposed to heavy rain
approaching closer to the campfire, warm orange fire light becomes more dominant against the blue dusk

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the rain-soaked forest toward the burning campfire

entered.detail: simple wooden bench or log seat placed near the campfire
warm yellow lights from another distant cabin or camp visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: Moving out from under the shelter, the scene opens into a rain-soaked forest clearing. The camera approaches the burning campfire as the wooden cabin recedes behind. A wooden bench sits near the fire while distant lights twinkle through the trees. The ground transitions from wooden planks to wet earth, with heavy rain falling directly overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered warmth of a cabin porch into the immersive chill of a rain-soaked forest clearing. It begins under the cover of a wooden roof at dusk, gliding along a wet, reflective deck illuminated by a glowing lantern on the wall. As the camera moves forward, it leaves the shelter of the cabin behind, transitioning from the wooden planks to the damp earth of the outdoors. The scene then opens into the heavy rainfall of the clearing, approaching a burning campfire and a nearby wooden bench while distant lights twinkle through the surrounding trees.
